---
id: get-companies-company-id-new-supply-order-status
title: "get-companyId-newSupplyOrderStatus"
description: "This service tracks the order placed to the supplier and its status. The order details fetched defaults to last 7 days from the current date. The service also provides customizable date options as optional parameters."
sidebar_label: "get-companyId-newSupplyOrderStatus"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/stock-management-api-spec
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"get-companyId-newSupplyOrderStatus"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/companies/{companyId}/newSupplyOrderStatus"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This service tracks the order placed to the supplier and its status. The order details fetched defaults to last 7 days from the current date. The service also provides customizable date options as optional parameters.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
